forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of morning fog in the north. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 30 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the southwest. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Heavy falls possible. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Heavy falls possible. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Heavy falls possible. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Heavy falls possible south of Coober Pedy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Leigh Creek from the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
